## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (new tool / prompt / capability)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Test only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (typecheck + lint + tests)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests (see `.claude/rules/testing.md`)
- [ ] Atomic-edit safety contract preserved if touching write paths
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under "Unreleased" or the upcoming version
- [ ] `README.md` updated if a new tool/prompt was added or behavior changed
